channel.title: MidJourney on Linus Torvalds

item.title: ChatGPT 创作
item.description: 人類還剩幾集可以逃？ChatGPT + Midjourney + Clipchamp AI大軍聯合玩內容創作 (文稿/插圖/配樂/配音/字幕全包) ChatGPT https://openai.com/blog/chatgpt/ Midjourney https://www.midjourney.com/ Clipchamp https://clipchamp.com/ PromptHero https://prompthero.com/ Clip Interrogator https://replicate.com/pharmapsychotic… Aiva AI Music https://creators.aiva.ai/
